text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've had a headache since this morning. I didn't
realize how hard I've been pushing myself...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I read somewhere that headaches are a result of
disruptions in one's daily life, but I've been
exercising and sleeping as usual, so why?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's a nutritional issue. What have I eaten
in the past few days?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Just trying to remember is making the pain
worse... It's like that age-old question, which
came first, the carrot or the hunger?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O continues to suffer from her
headache of unknown origin for some time.
